articles.author: IDS staff
articles.title: LIVE UPDATES: 5 wounded by gunfire in stable condition after Kirkwood shooting; no suspects in custody - Indiana Daily Student
articles.description: A press conference took place at 1 p.m. at City Hall.
articles.content:
Police have not yet taken suspects into custody following a shooting on Kirkwood Avenue early Sunday morning that wounded at least nine people.  
One victim suffered a bullet wound and injuries from… [+10486 chars]
